name: Pixir customization audit
description: Read-only review of Pixir customization surfaces before an upstream sync.

focus.description: The customization surface to audit, such as skills, workflows, or patch evidence.

steps.task: Audit the PATCHMD and evidence surfaces for {{focus}}. Check patch.md, .docs/patch-kit, .docs/patches, .docs/templates, and scripts/patch_cli.py. Return current state, missing evidence, and safe next commands.

Audit Pixir's customization primitives for {{focus}}. Focus on AGENTS.md, Skills, workflow templates, ADRs, and tests. Report where local practices are installed and what must be preserved during an upstream sync.
Synthesize the customization audit for {{focus}}. Separate confirmed facts, likely drift risks, missing artifacts, and recommended next PATCHMD steps.
